source_pr.title: add test flag to skip long time DDL test.

root_cause_explanation: DDL test suites can be long-running under race/slow CI. This PR stabilizes CI by introducing a `skip_ddl` flag and skipping the long-running DDL suites by default (run with `-skip_ddl=false` when needed), reducing timeout risk.
fix_pattern: Gate long-running/slow test suites behind a flag (skip by default in race/CI) and provide an explicit opt-in to run the full DDL test set.

evidence: files: Makefile, ddl/column_test.go, ddl/ddl_db_test.go, ddl/index_test.go, ddl/worker_test.go

analysis:
